subject: Sprint planning - 2026-03-10
notes_text:
## Discussed
- Backlog grooming for Q2
- Tom taking canonical fields integration
- Sarah owning schema service deployment

## Decisions

- Deprecate old mutation API by end of Q2
action_items: Tom: write integration tests by Friday

subject: Architecture review - schema service
notes_text:
## Agenda
- Review embedding model choice (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
- Discuss threshold tuning (0.88 for fields, 0.80 for schemas)
- Plan for schema-infra deployment

## Outcome
- Keep current thresholds, add monitoring for false positive rate
- Deploy to staging next week for load testing
